question: What are your business hours?
answer: Our business hours are Monday to Friday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM IST. We are closed on weekends and public holidays.

question: Where is your office located?
answer: Our main office is located at 42, Tech Park, MG Road, Bangalore - 560001, Karnataka, India. We also have regional offices in Mumbai and Delhi.

question: What services do you offer?
answer: We offer a range of services including software development, cloud consulting, IT support, digital marketing, and product design. Visit our Services page for full details.

question: How can I contact customer support?
answer: You can contact our support team via email at support@example.com, call us at +91-9876543210, or use the live chat on our website. Support hours are Mon–Sat, 9 AM to 8 PM.

question: What is the support email address?
answer: Our support email is support@example.com. We typically respond within 24 business hours. For urgent issues, please call us directly.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password: (1) Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. (2) Enter your registered email. (3) Check your inbox for the reset link. (4) Click the link and set a new password. The link expires in 30 minutes.

question: I cannot login to my account
answer: If you cannot log in: (1) Check your email and password are correct. (2) Try resetting your password via 'Forgot Password'. (3) Clear your browser cache. (4) Disable browser extensions. If the issue persists, contact support@example.com.

question: How do I create a new account?
answer: Creating an account is free and easy. Click 'Sign Up' on our homepage, fill in your name, email, and password, verify your email address, and you're all set!

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To delete your account, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. Note: This action is permanent and all your data will be erased. If you just need a break, consider deactivating instead.

question: What is your refund policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. To request a refund, contact support@example.com within 30 days of purchase with your order ID. Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days.

question: How long does a refund take?
answer: Once your refund is approved, it takes 5–7 business days to reflect in your account. You will receive a confirmation email when the refund is initiated.

question: What are your pricing plans?
answer: We offer three plans: Basic (₹999/month) – for individuals, Pro (₹2,499/month) – for small teams, and Enterprise (custom pricing) – for large organizations. Annual plans get a 20% discount.

question: Do you offer a free trial?
answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial on all plans — no credit card required. You get full access to all features during the trial period.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), UPI, Net Banking, and PayPal. For Enterprise plans, we also support bank transfers and invoicing.

question: How do I download my invoice?
answer: Log in to your account, go to Settings > Billing > Invoice History. You can download invoices in PDF format for any past transaction.

question: How do I update my billing information?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Payment Methods to update your card or billing details. Changes take effect from your next billing cycle.

question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Standard delivery takes 5–7 business days. Express delivery (2–3 days) is available at an additional charge. You will receive a tracking number once your order is dispatched.

question: Do you offer international shipping?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries. International delivery typically takes 10–15 business days. Customs duties may apply depending on your country.

question: The website is not loading properly
answer: If our website isn't loading: (1) Refresh the page (Ctrl+F5). (2) Clear your browser cache. (3) Try a different browser. (4) Check your internet connection. (5) Try accessing from incognito/private mode. If the issue continues, email support@example.com.

question: How do I update the app?
answer: For mobile: visit the App Store (iOS) or Play Store (Android) and tap 'Update'. For desktop: the app updates automatically, or go to Help > Check for Updates.

question: I am getting an error message
answer: Please take a screenshot of the error and email it to support@example.com with a description of what you were doing. Our technical team will respond within 4 hours on business days.

question: Is my data safe with you?
answer: Yes, your data is fully secure. We use 256-bit SSL encryption, are ISO 27001 certified, and comply with GDPR. We never sell your data to third parties. See our Privacy Policy for full details.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication and toggle it on. You can use SMS OTP or an authenticator app like Google Authenticator. Highly recommended for account safety!

question: How do I submit a support ticket?
answer: You can submit a support ticket by: (1) Logging into your account. (2) Clicking Help > Submit a Ticket. (3) Filling in the issue details. Our team responds within 24 hours.

question: Do you have live chat support?
answer: Yes! Live chat is available Monday to Saturday from 9 AM to 8 PM IST. Click the chat icon at the bottom-right of any page on our website to start a conversation.

question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade anytime from Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Upgrades take effect immediately (prorated charge applies). Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.

question: Do you offer custom solutions?
answer: Absolutely! We offer fully customized solutions for enterprises. Contact our sales team at sales@example.com or call +91-9876543211 to discuss your specific requirements.

question: How do I change my email address?
answer: Go to Settings > Profile > Email Address. Enter your new email and confirm the change via the verification link sent to both old and new email addresses.

question: Are there any hidden charges?
answer: No hidden charges whatsoever. The price you see is exactly what you pay. Taxes (GST) may apply based on your location and will always be shown clearly before checkout.

question: Can I get a refund after 30 days?
answer: Unfortunately, refunds are not available after 30 days from the purchase date. However, if you're facing a genuine issue, please write to us at support@example.com and we'll review it on a case-by-case basis.

question: Who are you and what do you do?
answer: We are Example Corp, a technology company founded in 2015, helping businesses grow with innovative software solutions. We serve 10,000+ clients across 50 countries.

question: Which browsers are supported?
answer: We support all modern browsers: Google Chrome (recommended), Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Edge, and Safari. Please ensure your browser is updated to the latest version for the best experience.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: Once your order is shipped, you'll receive an email with a tracking number. Visit our website, go to Orders > Track Order, and enter your tracking number to see real-time updates.

question: I think my account was hacked
answer: Act immediately! (1) Change your password right away. (2) Enable Two-Factor Authentication. (3) Log out of all sessions via Settings > Security. (4) Email security@example.com with details. Our security team will help.

question: When will I be charged?
answer: You are charged on the same date every month (or year for annual plans) from the day you subscribed. You'll receive a reminder email 3 days before the renewal date.
